в—Џ Phase 3 complete. Here's what I did:

   1. Rewrote CreateDialog.jsx вЂ” Schema-driven with all 7 artifact types (prototype,
  canvas, component, flow, object, record, page)
   2. Expanded command palette вЂ” Added Object + Record to the create section
   3. Event bridge вЂ” storyboard:create-artifact custom event lets canvas
  menus/workspace trigger creation
   4. Validation вЂ” Pattern matching, mutual exclusivity (url/flow), required fields
   5. Theme-aware вЂ” CSS custom properties for dark mode

  Build passes вњ…. Message queued to Leader.
